title: LIVING FREE MINISTRIES - 211info
text: LIVING HOPE CHURCH LIVING FREE MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Christian faith-based support groups and classes for individuals experiencing addiction to alcohol, drugs, food, or pornography, as well as for those dealing with anger, depression, grief, and divorce. Offers Beyond the Walls, a class for families with loved ones who are incarcerated. Child care is available for support groups and classes. Also provides a community meal. Worship services are offered but are not required for participation. 2711 NE Andresen Road Vancouver, WA 98661 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: -Community meal: Tuesday 5:30pm -Support groups: 7:20pm, support group times vary -Worship service: Tuesday 6:30pm-7:20pm Email (360) 944-3905 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (360) 944-3905 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Donation suggested to cover child care. Occasional book fee for classes. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Living Free Ministries: Tuesday 5:30pm Worship Service: Saturday 6pm, Sunday 9am and 11am Live Love Outreach: Wednesday 5pm-7:30pm, Sunday 1:30pm-4pm Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Support Groups Anger Management Community Meals Drug Use Disorder Support Groups Families of Inmates Support Groups General Bereavement and Grief Support Groups Mental Health Related Support Groups Separation/Divorce Support Groups Sexual/Love Addiction Support Groups Weight Management Support Groups If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIVING HOPE CHURCH
